narrative:
Hardin County has 17,298 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 27.7% of registrants.
